WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        CASE 
            WHEN consumption_2013 > 0 
            THEN ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100.0
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM pivot_consumption
    WHERE consumption_2012 IS NOT NULL 
        AND consumption_2013 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    increase,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH cust_2013 AS (
  SELECT y.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT *,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption ASC) AS rnk
  FROM cust_2013
),
lowest_per_segment AS (
  SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_annual_consumption
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rnk = 1
  GROUP BY Segment
),
segments AS (
  SELECT Segment, avg_annual_consumption
  FROM lowest_per_segment
  WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;

WITH player_avg_finishing AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        p.height,
        AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.height
),
height_extremes AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(height) AS max_height,
        MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
),
tallest_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        'highest' AS player_group,
        AVG(paf.avg_finishing) AS group_avg_finishing
    FROM player_avg_finishing paf
    CROSS JOIN height_extremes he
    WHERE paf.height = he.max_height
),
shortest_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        'shortest' AS player_group,
        AVG(paf.avg_finishing) AS group_avg_finishing
    FROM player_avg_finishing paf
    CROSS JOIN height_extremes he
    WHERE paf.height = he.min_height
)
SELECT 
    player_group,
    group_avg_finishing
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM tallest_avg
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM shortest_avg
) AS groups
ORDER BY group_avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH circuit_lap_times AS (
    SELECT 
        c.circuitId,
        c.name AS circuit_name,
        c.location,
        r.year,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        res.fastestLapTime,
        -- Convert fastestLapTime to seconds for numeric comparison
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60
         + CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1) AS REAL)) AS lap_time_seconds
    FROM circuits c
    JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
        AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
        AND res.fastestLapTime != ''
),
ranked_laps AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY circuitId ORDER BY lap_time_seconds ASC) AS rn
    FROM circuit_lap_times
)
SELECT 
    circuit_name,
    location,
    fastestLapTime AS lap_record,
    driver_name,
    year
FROM ranked_laps
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY circuit_name;

WITH RECURSIVE
german_cards AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.uuid, c.subtypes, c.supertypes
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE f.language = 'German'
      AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL
      AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
),
split_subtypes AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(subtypes, 1, instr(subtypes || ',', ',') - 1) AS subtype,
           substr(subtypes, instr(subtypes || ',', ',') + 1) AS remainder
    FROM german_cards
    WHERE subtypes != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(remainder, 1, instr(remainder || ',', ',') - 1),
           substr(remainder, instr(remainder || ',', ',') + 1)
    FROM split_subtypes
    WHERE remainder != ''
),
split_supertypes AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(supertypes, 1, instr(supertypes || ',', ',') - 1) AS supertype,
           substr(supertypes, instr(supertypes || ',', ',') + 1) AS remainder
    FROM german_cards
    WHERE supertypes != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(remainder, 1, instr(remainder || ',', ',') - 1),
           substr(remainder, instr(remainder || ',', ',') + 1)
    FROM split_supertypes
    WHERE remainder != ''
),
all_types AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT subtype AS type
    FROM split_subtypes
    WHERE subtype != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT supertype AS type
    FROM split_supertypes
    WHERE supertype != ''
)
SELECT type
FROM all_types
ORDER BY type;

    FROM first_approved_loan fal
    JOIN disp d ON fal.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
),
balance_19930322 AS (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN owner_client oc ON t.account_id = oc.account_id
    WHERE t.date <= '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_19981227 AS (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN owner_client oc ON t.account_id = oc.account_id
    WHERE t.date <= '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY t.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_19981227) AS balance_A,
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322) AS balance_B,
    ROUND(
        ((SELECT balance FROM balance_19981227) - (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322)) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF((SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322), 0), 
        2
    ) AS increase_rate_percent
FROM owner_client;

WITH male_accounts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
),
loan_1996 AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS total_1996
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM male_accounts)
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'
),
loan_1997 AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS total_1997
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM male_accounts)
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997'
)
SELECT 
    total_1996,
    total_1997,
    CASE 
        WHEN total_1996 = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND((total_1997 - total_1996) * 100.0 / total_1996, 2)
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM loan_1996, loan_1997;
